items.question: How long will my concrete patio last?
items.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, a Maxima Concrete patio can last 30 years or more.

items.question: Can I customize the color, pattern, and texture?
items.answer: Yes. We offer stamped, colored, broom-finished, exposed aggregate, and paver options to match your home.

items.question: How long does a patio installation take?
items.answer: Most patios are completed in 3–7 days, depending on size, finish, and site conditions.

items.question: Do you offer free patio consultations?
items.answer: Yes. We provide free on-site design consultations and estimates throughout Central Ohio.
